title: selaginella iridescens
intro: Selaginella iridescens, also known as the "Rainbow Plant," is a species of evergreen plant in the Selaginellaceae family, native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Selaginella iridescens include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Selaginella iridescens can be found in various forms, including tea, capsule, and tincture, and are often used to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
